license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.79jhr4n
title: Fatty acid extraction and derivatisation
author: Igem Dusseldorf

steps_raw.instruction: samples with 4 oD-units ( e.g.: oD = 1, you will need 4 ml culture ) you should make 4 or more replicates
centrifuge in a clean glass tube @ 4500 x g 00:10:00

200 µl C17 internal standard (1 mg/ml hexane) + 9,8 ml MeOH/3N HCl caution! fill in a beaker and take the needed amount out of this beaker, don't take out directly from original container to avoid contaminating stock solution. always work with gloves
heat @ 90°C after 5 minutes re-tighten lids of the glass tubes! 01:00:00
add 1 ml hexane hexane is very volatile, that's why working quickly is necessary
transfer hexane phase in to GC vial with screw cap
dilute samples ( 10 µl sample + 90 µl hexane ) wash hamilton between samples with hexane all of these samples can be frozen @ -20 until further analysis
add 1 ml extraction solution to samples and blank For each new batch of samples, include a blank
